core_idea: Devyat' Assoc. North Section 3 Sinclair is a Status Specialist — **Devyat' Courier** who races **Courier Trunk — Sinclair** below **15** for faster gains, stacking **Rupture** on targets along the way, spikes clash power and Shield at **15+**, then **W-wait, I need to do some maintenance…!** forces **Strategic R&R** so **Upon Retreat** can buff allies. Rejoining once per fight **halves** carried stacks — front-load your best burst before returning.
playstyle_guide:
- **Courier Trunk** — below **15** you gain stacks faster; at **15+** skills spike and **W-wait, I need to do some maintenance…!** can replace your Counter to begin the retreat sequence.
- Rejoining once per encounter **halves** your carried stacks — treat the first rotation as your main value window before returning.
- Skills check **15+ Rupture** — favour those coins when stacked.
- Skills grant **Haste** next turn — use them when you want to act earlier on the following round.

**S1 — Courier Trunk - Decay Hammer** (BP 3, CP +4, x2): rolls — low 3, high 11 (Extremely Low).
- Scales Coin Power with Courier stacks — apply liberally before committing (cap +2).
- Gain 1 Courier Trunk — Sinclair; - If this unit has less than 15 Courier Trunk — Sinclair, gain 1 additional Courier Trunk — Sinclair
- Peak output requires both conditions: Inflict +2 Rupture Count | - At 15+ Courier Trunk — Sinclair, inflict +1 additional Rupture Count.

**S2 — Courier Trunk - Demolition Gadget** (BP 4, CP +4, x3): rolls — low 4, high 16 (Slightly Low).
- Scales Coin Power with Courier stacks — apply liberally before committing (cap +2).
- Gain 1 Courier Trunk — Sinclair; - If this unit has less than 15 Courier Trunk — Sinclair, gain 2 additional Courier Trunk — Sinclair
- Peak output requires both conditions: Inflict 2 Rupture | - At 15+ Courier Trunk — Sinclair, inflict +1 Rupture Count.

**S3 — Poludnitsa… I trust you!** (BP 5, CP +4, x3): rolls — low 5, high 17 (Average / High stacked).
- Scales Coin Power with Courier stacks — apply liberally before committing (cap +2).
- Inflict +1 Rupture Count; - Inflict +1 additional Rupture Count for every 10 Courier Trunk — Sinclair (max 2)
- Inflict 3 Rupture; - Inflict +1 additional Rupture for every 10 Courier Trunk — Sinclair (max 2)

Combat passive — **I'll do better next time…**: <For Chain Battles> When, after Retreating using 'Strategic R&R Mode', if this unit rejoins the battle, halve the Courier Trunk — Sinclai….

Combat passive — **A moment, please…**: Turn Start: At 6+ Speed, or if this unit has Haste, gain (Courier Trunk — Sinclair)% of this unit's max HP as Shield (max 20%).
  - Upon Retreat, apply 1 Clash Power Up to 2 allies next turn (prioritizes Substituted units first, then in Deployment order).
  - Lasts for 1 additional turn for every 15 Courier Trunk — Sinclair (2 more turns max).

Defense skill — **Counter: Courier Assistance & Crisis Control System**: [Combat Start] At 15+ Courier Trunk — Sinclair, activate 'W-wait, I need to do some maintenance…!' instead (once per turn).
  - [Combat Start] If this Skill is to be activated, gain (Courier Trunk — Sinclair)% of this unit's max HP as Shield (max 25%, once per turn).
